releaseNotes: Version 1.0.0 build 123: adds a .srtforge.json output manifest with source, audio selection, settings, primary output, and generated files, while keeping the result outputs panel, SRT/TXT/VTT/ASS/video outputs, GitHub API update checking, ASR Quality Report, SRT QA, PolyWAV BOOM/LAV channel selection, Burned MP4 export, Lithuanian/English output, and offline setup.
